blocks.en: For a video call or a cloud game, being fast on average isn't enough — an occasional long wait for the channel shows up as a freeze or a stutter. Wi-Fi 7 tackles this worst-case latency directly.
blocks.zh: 对于视频通话或云游戏，平均快还不够——偶尔一次为信道的长时间等待，会表现为画面卡顿或顿挫。Wi-Fi 7 直接针对这种最坏情况时延下手。

blocks.en: Target Wake Time (TWT) lets a device and AP agree on scheduled service periods. Restricted TWT (R-TWT) goes further: it reserves protected windows for latency-sensitive traffic, and asks other stations to keep those windows clear.
blocks.zh: 目标唤醒时间（TWT）让设备与 AP 约定计划内的服务时段。受限 TWT（R-TWT）更进一步：它为时延敏感流量预留受保护的时间窗，并要求其他站点让出这些时间窗。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant AP
  participant RT as Latency-critical STA
  participant O as Other STAs
  AP->>RT: R-TWT schedule (protected window)
  AP->>O: please defer during the window
  Note over RT,AP: window opens — low-latency traffic flows
  RT->>AP: time-critical frames
  Note over O: other STAs hold off
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant AP
  participant RT as 时延关键 STA
  participant O as 其他 STA
  AP->>RT: R-TWT 调度（受保护时间窗）
  AP->>O: 窗口内请退避
  Note over RT,AP: 窗口开启——低时延流量通行
  RT->>AP: 时间关键帧
  Note over O: 其他 STA 暂缓

blocks.en: It's a shift in thinking: instead of every device always fighting for the channel (CSMA/CA), the AP carves out reserved, predictable slots for the traffic that can't tolerate jitter.
blocks.zh: 这是一种思路转变：不再让每台设备始终争抢信道（CSMA/CA），而是由 AP 为无法容忍抖动的流量划出预留的、可预测的时隙。

blocks.en: Restricted TWT is specified in clause 35.8 of 802.11be: the schedule announcement, the rules for setting up and protecting R-TWT service periods, and how stations honour them.
blocks.zh: 受限 TWT 规定于 802.11be 第 35.8 节：调度通告、建立与保护 R-TWT 服务时段的规则，以及站点如何遵从。
